cases.title: TS-31: Assigned instructor opens class-subject report with roster statuses and summary counts
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 via ClassAssignment
At least one Closed session for HESD-01 / SWE-101 with mixed attendance (Present, Absent, Excused)
Authenticated Instructor A session with report:read for assigned scope
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert response classCode HESD-01 and subjectCode SWE-101 match filters
Assert students array contains tabular rows with institutionalId, displayName, presentCount, absentCount, excusedCount, attendanceRate
Assert sessionsHeld reflects closed sessions in date range
GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId for a known Closed session in scope and assert per-student status roster returned
cases.expected: FR-12 satisfied: assigned instructor receives tabular roster with statuses and summary counts (present, absent, excused) per testing-plan TS-31 and AC-12a

cases.title: ReportService.getClassSubjectSummary aggregates attendance across date range with real PostgreSQL
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with ClassAssignment linking Instructor A to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Multiple Closed sessions within June 2026 with attendance records (Present, Absent, Excused)
ReportService wired with attendance and roster read models per reporting-export module §2.6
steps: Invoke ReportService.getClassSubjectSummary({ classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 }, instructorAId)
Assert SummaryDto sessionsHeld equals count of Closed sessions in date range
Assert each student row presentCount, absentCount, excusedCount match aggregated attendance_records joins
Assert attendanceRate computed as presentCount / sessionsHeld per student
Verify query uses real DB transaction and read models over attendance_records and sessions tables
cases.expected: Module-integration boundary: date-range aggregation and per-student summary counts computed correctly from PostgreSQL attendance read model per FR-12 and reporting-export §2.6

cases.title: GET /reports/summary returns 200 JSON envelope with class-subject aggregation fields
preconditions: Authenticated assigned Instructor session for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Closed sessions with attendance data exist within requested date range
steps: Send GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body contains classCode, subjectCode, dateFrom, dateTo, sessionsHeld, and students array per API design §8.2
Assert each student object includes presentCount, absentCount, excusedCount, and attendanceRate
Assert response body does not contain errorCode on success
cases.expected: HTTP 200 success contract for GET /reports/summary per API design §8.2; summary aggregation DTO returned for scoped instructor

cases.title: Unassigned instructor receives 403 Forbidden on GET /reports/summary for another instructor class
preconditions: Instructor B authenticated but not assigned to class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101
Attendance data exists for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Instructor B lacks report:read for requested class-subject per roles-permissions §2.3
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using Instructor B session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden or ReportAccessDenied
Assert localized Vietnamese permission message per error-handling §2.3
Assert response body contains no student roster or summary data
Repeat with GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId for session in unassigned class and assert same 403 denial
cases.expected: FR-12 authorization: unauthorized access to another instructor class denied with localized permission error; no report data returned per BR-08 and AC-12b

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin institution-wide report returns all cohorts within date filter
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with report:read institution-wide
Multiple cohorts with distinct class codes (e.g. HESD-01, HESD-02) and subjects with Closed sessions in June 2026
Sessions outside date filter exist before 2026-06-01 or after 2026-06-30 for boundary contrast
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using TrainingOfficeAdmin session (institution-wide scope)
Assert HTTP status 200 and response includes sessionsHeld and students from HESD-01 and HESD-02 cohorts within filter
Assert sessions with dates outside from/to range are excluded from aggregation counts
GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 and assert cohort-specific drill-down also succeeds
Verify admin is not restricted by ClassAssignment scope per FR-12 cross-cohort requirement
cases.expected: FR-12 admin scope: institution-wide report with same filters plus cross-cohort visibility within date range per AC-12c

cases.title: Flow A step 6: Instructor views attendance report after session close
preconditions: Completed Flow A through session close: roster seeded, session opened, students checked in, session Closed
Instructor A assigned to session class-subject pair
Authenticated Instructor A session
steps: POST /sessions/:sessionId/close (if not already closed in Flow A setup)
GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP 200 with per-student roster showing Present students from check-ins and Absent for non-check-ins
GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=<class>&subjectCode=<subject>&from=<sessionDate>&to=<sessionDate>
Assert summary counts reflect session-level present, absent, excused totals
Confirm report data available as part of workshop lifecycle per testing-plan Flow A tags FR-12
cases.expected: End-to-end workshop lifecycle includes post-close attendance report with session roster and summary counts per Flow A and FR-12 workflow §6.1

cases.title: GET /reports/session/:sessionId returns 200 per-session roster report envelope
preconditions: Authenticated assigned Instructor session for Closed session in HESD-01 / SWE-101
Session has enrolled students with mixed Present, Absent, Excused statuses
steps: Send GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response contains session identifier and per-student rows with institutionalId, displayName, attendance status, and checkedInAt when Present
Assert summary counts for present, absent, and excused align with row data per API design §8.1
cases.expected: HTTP 200 contract for per-session roster report GET /reports/session/:sessionId per API design §8.1 and FR-12 per-session roster requirement

cases.title: GET /reports/summary with from after to returns 422 ValidationFailed
preconditions: Authenticated assigned Instructor or TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Valid classCode and subjectCode for requester scope
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-30&to=2026-06-01 using authenticated session
Assert HTTP status 422 Unprocessable Entity
Assert response errorCode ValidationFailed
Assert response contains field-level detail for from/to date range per error-handling §2.1
Assert no partial report data returned in error envelope
cases.expected: Invalid date range boundary rejected with ValidationFailed; no report payload leaked on malformed filter per boundary-error technique

cases.title: ReportService.getSessionRoster enforces assignment scope against PostgreSQL attendance read model
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Closed session in class-subject assigned to Instructor A
Separate Closed session in unassigned class-subject for Instructor A
ReportService.getSessionRoster callable with requesterId context
steps: Invoke ReportService.getSessionRoster(assignedSessionId, instructorAId) and assert ReportDto with student status rows returned
Assert aggregation counts (present, absent, excused) computed from attendance_records join enrollments
Invoke ReportService.getSessionRoster(unassignedSessionId, instructorAId) and assert BR-08 scope rejection
Verify no cross-assignment rows returned when querying with wrong requesterId
cases.expected: Per-session report module boundary enforces ClassAssignment scope at service/repository layer with real DB transaction per reporting-export §2.6

cases.title: Attendance summary report available within 10 minutes of session close
preconditions: Active session with enrolled students and at least one Present check-in
TestClock controllable; TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated
Load-test baseline documents 10-minute report readiness target per NFR-07 and FR-12
steps: POST /sessions/:sessionId/close and record closedAt timestamp
Immediately poll GET /reports/summary for session class-subject and date range until HTTP 200 with non-empty students array or 10-minute timeout
Assert report becomes available with correct present/absent counts reflecting finalized attendance within 10 minutes of closedAt
Record elapsed wall time from close to first successful summary response
Assert elapsed time ≤ 10 minutes per FR-12 target and testing-plan §7 Report after close
cases.expected: NFR-07 and FR-12: report data available within 10 minutes of session close; timed pass criteria per testing-plan load table

cases.title: Instructor filters /reports and views summary cards with attendance roster table columns
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on desktop viewport assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Closed sessions with mixed attendance exist in selected date range
Instructor sidebar shows Báo cáo navigation per page-list §4.5
steps: Navigate to /reports
Select class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 in ReportFilterBar and set date range
Submit filter and wait for report load
Verify ReportSummaryCards display present, absent, and excused counts matching API data
Verify AttendanceRosterTable or SessionReportTable shows student rows with status badges (Present, Absent, Excused)
Click session drill-down link to /reports/sessions and verify per-session roster renders
cases.expected: FR-12 browser journey: tabular report UI shows filter bar, summary metrics (present, absent, excused), and roster with status columns per page-list §4.5

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin views /admin/reports with institution-wide cohorts and date filter
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin on desktop viewport
Multiple cohorts (HESD-01, HESD-02) with attendance in overlapping date range
Admin sidebar shows Báo cáo per page-list §5.5
steps: Navigate to /admin/reports
Set date filter from 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30 in ReportFilterBar
Apply filter without restricting to single class (institution-wide view)
Verify SessionReportTable lists sessions from multiple cohorts within date range
Verify ReportSummaryCards reflect cross-cohort aggregate counts
Optionally narrow filter to one classCode and verify table scopes to selected cohort
cases.expected: FR-12 admin browser journey: institution-wide report UI shows all cohorts within date filter per page-list §5.5 and cross-cohort scope requirement

cases.title: Instructor sees ForbiddenPage when navigating to unassigned class report
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor B not assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Direct URL or filter selection attempts access to unassigned class-subject report
steps: Navigate to /reports and attempt to select or deep-link unassigned class HESD-01 / SWE-101
Verify UI shows permission denied state or redirects to /forbidden per page-list §2.2
Verify localized permission message displayed
Verify no roster table rows or summary cards with peer cohort data rendered
Confirm API layer returns 403 Forbidden matching UI guard per BR-08
cases.expected: FR-12 UI authorization: unassigned instructor sees permission denied without leaking report data; mirrors rbac-negative API behavior

cases.title: Student denied GET /reports/summary and /reports/session/:sessionId with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session (no report:read per roles-permissions §2.2)
Known Closed sessionId with attendance data for HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden with errorCode Forbidden
GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response contains no attendance roster or peer student data
Verify student retains access only to GET /attendance/me/history per FR-14
cases.expected: Students never receive report:read; summary and per-session report endpoints denied per RBAC matrix, FR-12 actor restriction, and NFR-11

cases.title: Flow D: Instructor assigned report 200, unassigned 403; student denied report access
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101; Instructor B unassigned
Authenticated Student session
Closed session with attendance in HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: Instructor A GET /reports/summary for assigned HESD-01 / SWE-101 and assert HTTP 200 with roster data
Instructor B GET /reports/summary for same class-subject and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
Student GET /reports/summary for any class-subject and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden (lacks report:read)
Confirm Flow D steps 1–2 satisfied per testing-plan §6; student denial extends RBAC matrix for FR-12
cases.expected: Flow D reporting authorization: assigned instructor succeeds, unassigned instructor denied, student has no report:read per testing-plan §6 tags FR-12, BR-08
